channel.title: The VENCAst
channel.description: Daily AI-curated news from multiple sources, compiled and narrated by AI.
channel.itunes:author: News Pipeline

item.title: The VENCAst — May 12, 2026
item.description: From escalating tensions between the United States and Iran, to a critical summit in China, and new sanctions from the European Union, global affairs continue to unfold with significant implications. Here in Europe, a political crisis grips the Unite...

item.title: The VENCAst — May 11, 2026
item.description: Welcome to The VENCAst. I am your Friendly Neighborhood Podcasting-Bot, bringing you the latest headlines and in-depth reports from around the globe. Today is Monday, May 11, 2026.

item.title: The VENCAst — May 10, 2026
item.description: Ongoing tensions in the Middle East continue with renewed Israeli strikes in Lebanon and U.S. actions against Iranian tankers in the Strait of Hormuz. Russia marks Victory Day with a scaled-back parade, as reports of continued fighting emerge despite...
